scope_goal: Canonicalize materialized A2UI action order in `src/qual/ui/a2ui.py` so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic, and align packet planner defaults and review-facing packet text with the current Milestone 3 / capability 4 canon.
scope_completed: Canonicalized materialized A2UI action order in `src/qual/ui/a2ui.py` and covered it in `tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py` so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic. Runtime change commit: `b929fe6c7a1159c7882acedd247aca31a93cd123`.

Canonicalized stale `feat-a2ui-contract` handoff fields in the packet planner to the current Milestone 3 / capability 4 canon, removed the packet-planner fallback that invented a synthetic handback note for missing `tasks_completed`, added explicit `Scope completed` packet support, and updated the packet-planner regression coverage to the current Milestone 3 / capability 4 mapping.
kickoff_budget_note: The reviewed A2UI runtime slice stays narrow: one runtime file plus one focused contract test. The later packet/planner maintenance exists only to make re-review traceable against the current Milestone 3 / capability 4 canon.
approved_exception_note: Approved shared regression coverage in `tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py` to prove deterministic CLI fallback action ordering.
tasks_completed: Updated `src/qual/ui/a2ui.py` to sort filtered actions by canonical JSON before terminal rendering, preserving deterministic CLI fallback output.
Kept contract coverage in `tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py` for canonical action ordering and allowlisted fallback behavior.
Updated `codex_packet_handoff/tools/planner.py` so missing `tasks_completed` values are surfaced explicitly instead of backfilled with a synthetic handback note.
Added explicit `Scope completed` packet support and canonicalized the `feat-a2ui-contract` handoff mapping to Milestone 3 / capability 4.
Updated `tests/unit/test_packet_planner.py` to assert the current Milestone 3 / capability 4 mapping and the new `Scope completed` section.
Rewrote the handoff packet so the review trail shows the runtime A2UI delta and the packet-planner follow-up together.
roadmap_items: Milestone 3: Real workflow loop - move A2UI contracts into shared while keeping renderers outside shared.
feat-a2ui-contract - shared card/action contracts and selection models for the engine loop.
metadata_only_note: The current branch tip is a packet-refresh commit. Review the runtime A2UI implementation at `b929fe6c7a1159c7882acedd247aca31a93cd123`; later planner and handoff edits are metadata-only re-review support.
